zh.Ormskirk, Lancashire, England, United Ki: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾奧姆斯吉可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas De Worthington於大約1338年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾時，他的父親William De Worthington24歲，母親Isabel de Blainscough23歲。他和Marjory De Copull至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1390年在他的家鄉享年53歲。

zh-hans.Ormskirk, Lancashire, England, United Ki: 英国英格兰藍卡爾奧姆斯吉可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas De Worthington于大约1338年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾时，他的父亲William De Worthington24岁，母亲Isabel de Blainscough23岁。他和Marjory De Copull至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1390年在他的家乡享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Worthington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire, Cheshire, and Staffordshire): habitational name from any of the places in Lancashire and Leicestershire named Worthington. The placenames probably derive from an Old English personal name Weorth + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.
History: Nicholas Worthington emigrated from England to Old Saybrook, CT, c. 1650.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas De Worthington was born about 1338, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William De Worthington, was 24 and his mother, Isabel de Blainscough, was 23. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Marjory De Copull. He died in 1390, in his hometown, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas De Worthington est né environ 1338, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William De Worthington, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Blainscough, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Marjory De Copull. Il est décédé en 1390, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas De Worthington um 1338 in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William De Worthington 24 und seine Mutter Isabel de Blainscough 23. Er hatte mit Marjory De Copull mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1390 im Alter von 53 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas De Worthington è nato il circa 1338 nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William De Worthington, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Isabel de Blainscough, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Marjory De Copull. Morì nel 1390, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.Blainsciough, Lancashire, England: イギリスイギリスランカシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas De Worthingtonが約1338年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアで生まれた時，父William De Worthingtonは24歳，母Isabel de Blainscoughは23歳であった。彼はMarjory De Copullとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1390年に故郷で53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas De Worthington(이)가 대략 1338년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William De Worthington(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel de Blainscough(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Marjory De Copull(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1390년 그의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Ormskirk, Lancashire, England, United Ki: Ormskirk, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas De Worthington nasceu aproximadamente 1338, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William De Worthington, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Blainscough, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Marjory De Copull. Ele faleceu em 1390, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas De Worthington родился около 1338 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William De Worthington было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Blainscough, 23. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Marjory De Copull. Он умер в 1390 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas De Worthington nació aproximadamente 1338, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William De Worthington, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Isabel de Blainscough, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Marjory De Copull. Murió en 1390, en su pueblo, a la edad de 53 años.
